title: Monday no available in spanish?
excerpt: Right now we are using monday.com in spanish, but today everything have changed into the english version. Anyone else happened the same? It’s not a profile languaje selection, it’s all the business account and all the si…

posts.author: Jordi_Aparicio (Jordi Aparicio Corbella)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now we are using monday.com in spanish, but today everything have changed into the english version. Anyone else happened the same? It’s not a profile languaje selection, it’s all the business account and all the sites that have changed into english for all our employes. Any help? Thanks!
